title: GitHub Actions Artifact
description: Represents an artifact produced by a GitHub Actions workflow run.

node_id.description: The GraphQL node ID of the artifact.

size_in_bytes.description: The size in bytes of the artifact.

url.description: The API URL of the artifact.

archive_download_url.description: The API URL to download the artifact archive.

created_at.description: The date and time the artifact was created.

expires_at.description: The date and time the artifact expires.

updated_at.description: The date and time the artifact was last updated.

workflow_run.description: Minimal information about the workflow run that produced this artifact.

head_branch.description: The head branch for the workflow run.

head_sha.description: The head SHA for the workflow run.
